title: Demnadi
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Demnadi |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Demnadi system/Legends|Demnadi system]] *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Demnadi system/Legends|Demnadi system]] |sector=[[Far Xandil sector/Legends|Far Xandil sector]] |system=[[Demnadi system/Legends|Demnadi system]] |coordinates=P-16 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Cathers' office]]{{WEGCite|story=Just One Planetary Riot!|book=Heroes & Rogues}} |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|I am Major Fenris Sarhl, commander of the CompForce Demnadi Relief Operation, part of the regiment assigned to pacify this…''planet'' of yours.|Major Fenris Sarhl, to Governor Cathers|}} '''Demnadi''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Far Xandil sector/Legends|Far Xandil sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Demnadi planetary riot|planet-wide riot]], believed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Cathers]] to have been instigated by local [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] factions, erupted at Demnadi. In response, the Empire dispatched the [[CompForce Demnadi Relief Operation]], which consisted of just one [[Gender/Legends|man]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Fenris Sarhl]], to pacify the planet. ==Description== Demnadi was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Demnadi system/Legends|Demnadi system]], a part of the [[Far Xandil sector/Legends|Far Xandil sector]] in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. ==History== {{Quote|''What''…you mean they only sent ''one'' squad?''"
"''No, excellency ''[sic]'', not one squad, one person. ''I'' am the Demnadi Relief Force.''"
"''I don't understand!''"
"''Your communication ''did'' say you only had one planetary riot on your hands, did it not, Excellency?|Governor Cathers and Major Fenris Sarhl|}} The planet was a part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and it was the site of the [[Cathers' office|office]] of the local Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Cathers]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], several factions affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operated at Demnadi, and at some point, a [[Demnadi planetary riot|planet-wide riot]], believed by Cathers to have been instigated by the Rebels, erupted there. The rioters mounted an attack on Cathers' office, although the governor himself was not present at the [[Time/Legends|time]]. In response to the communication Cathers sent about the riot, the Empire dispatched a [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] to pacify the planet. The force included the [[CompForce Demnadi Relief Operation]], which consisted of just one [[Gender/Legends|man]], [[CompForce/Legends|CompForce]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Fenris Sarhl]]. Sarhl introduced himself to Cathers in the latter's office, whereupon the governor expressed his delight at the Imperial relief efforts assigned to Demnadi. However, when Sarhl revealed that he was the only person dispatched as part of the CompForce Demnadi Relief Operation, Cathers became confused, to which the CompForce major replied that Cathers' communication had mentioned that Demnadi was experiencing "only" one riot at the time. ==Behind the scenes== Demnadi appeared in "[[Just One Planetary Riot!]]," a short companion narrative included in ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Rick D. Stuart|Rick Stuart]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Demnadi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Demnadi, in grid square P-16. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Just One Planetary Riot!|book=Heroes & Rogues}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Far Xandil sector locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]]
